author: Siliconera
text:
Genshin Impact Luna VIII Update Special Program Airs This Week
The Genshin Impact Luna VIII Special Program will air this week and reintroduce Sandrone and what appears to be two new costumes.

author: Siliconera
text:
All 4 Kairosoft 30th Anniversary Game Bundles Now on Steam
Kairosoft released four game bundles, each with four titles, on Steam as part of its 30th anniversary celebration.

author: Siliconera
text:
Some English Persona 4 Revival Voice Actors Revealed
We now know five of the English voice actors for Persona 4 Revival, including who will be the new voice of Golden addition Marie.

author: Siliconera
text:
New Honkai: Star Rail Nendoroids Are Anaxa and Phainon
The next Honkai: Star Rail Nendoroids are a standard Anaxa figure and a Nendoroid Doll of Phainon.

author: Siliconera
text:
Live-Action Kiki’s Delivery Service Show in Development
Following the novel and anime film adaptation by Studio Ghibli, there will be a Kadokawa and BBC live-action Kiki's Delivery Service.

author: Siliconera
text:
Identity V Neo Series Pop Up Store Heading to Book Off USA
Identity V merchandise is now available in pop up shop locations at Book Off USA locations in two states.

author: Siliconera
text:
My Hero Academia Anime 10th Anniversary Plus Ultra Movie Shared
Toho and Bones shared a new animated short to celebrate the 10th anniversary of the My Hero Academia anime.

author: Siliconera
text:
DoDonPachi Resurrection Reignite Is Getting Battle Royale Mode
Up to ten players will be able to join the fray.

author: Siliconera
text:
Preview: Paralives Feels More Like an RPG Than Life Sim
The foundations are fun, but there are still some growing pains.

author: Siliconera
text:
Sonic the Hedgehog Woobles Kits Let You Crochet Amigurumi Sonic, Tails, and Knuckles
The Woobles' next video game amigurumi crochet kits are based on Sonic the Hedgehog and include Sonic, Tails, and Knuckles.

author: Siliconera
text:
Mega Man and Onimusha Will Be Playable at Gamescom 2026
Capcom will have 4 games at Gamescom 2026 booth, and Mega Man: Dual Override and Onimusha: Way of the Sword will be there.

author: Siliconera
text:
New Palworld Pals Toys and Blind Boxes Arrive in August
Palworld articulated Pal toys and sets of small blind box Mystery Egg figures are both on the way this summer.

author: Siliconera
text:
Gust Working on Atelier Yumia Switch 2 FPS Issues
Atelier Yumia Switch 2 Edition launched with fps and performance issues, but Gust is aware and working on a fix.

author: Siliconera
text:
Ghost in the Shell Anime Heading to Amazon Prime
The new The Ghost in the Shell anime adaptation will be streaming on Amazon Prime worldwide once it launches next month.

author: Siliconera
text:
Crunchyroll Summer 2026 Anime Schedule Shared
Black Torch, Smoking Behind the Supermarket with You, Re:Zero, and Hana-Kimi are among the Crunchyroll Spring 2026 anime.

author: Siliconera
text:
Final Fantasy Tactics Gets New Game+ and Zodiac Compatibility
Final Fantasy Tactics: The Ivalice Chronicles got a patch that adds new game+, a Zodiac Compatibility feature, and QOL updates.

author: Siliconera
text:
Kagurabachi Manga Going on Hiatus in Summer 2026
There will be no new chapters in July 2026, as the manga is projected to return in August 2026.

author: Siliconera
text:
Final Fantasy XIV Items Now Offered As Tax Rewards
Rewards include emotes, skins, and Fantasia.

author: Siliconera
text:
Preview: 2 Fights in 2 Tight Spaces Is a Start
I think there’s potential for 2 Fights 2 Tight Spaces to grow and the existing roadmap seems solid, but it needs more time.
